Name: Beach Side Listening
Description: Sun’s out, tunes on. Drop a song perfect for lounging by the waves or cruising the coast. Vibes are everything.

Name: Songs About Food
Description: Whether it’s a tasty metaphor or literally about snacks — if it makes your mouth water, serve it up.

Name: First Concerts
Description: Think back to your first concert experience. Share a song from the artist you saw — or a track that captures that feeling.

Name: Walk-Out Music
Description: You’re entering the ring, the stage, or the spotlight — what’s blasting behind you? Big entrances only.

Name: Songs About Work
Description: Office blues, grinding, hustling, or quitting — any song that taps into working life is fair game.

Name: Songs Everyone Knows
Description: The universal anthems. Play something everyone would recognize — crowd‑pleasers, stadium hits, or generational staples.

Name: Personal Fave – Exercise
Description: What gets you pumped? Share a song from your personal workout playlist — high energy, high motivation.

Name: Songs You’re Surprised Exist
Description: Ever stumble on a song so bizarre, niche, or out‑of‑pocket that you thought it was a joke? Bring the weird.

Name: Modern Songs That Sound Old
Description: Tracks from the last 10 years that sound like they could be from a different era. Think vintage vibes with a modern twist.

Name: Song About Endings
Description: Songs that deal with closure, farewells, breakups, or final chapters. Wrap the summer season with a reflective note.
